caption: 他先把空调开好了。
scene: Andy just inside the front door, one work shoe in his hand and the other still half-off, his face lifting with a tiny relieved smile as he looks up at a small wall-mounted AC unit with two faint breeze lines coming from it, a small shoe pile by his feet.
bible_hook: §2.5 small happiness — the other one already turned the AC on (paired with Andy's ten-hours-standing tired posture)
rationale: This week leaned into solo workday grind and a takeout-collapse; this brings back the unspoken-care dynamic with a fresh AC anchor (recent posts used AC only as a remote tug-of-war, not the quiet gift) while keeping Andy's home-arrival exhaustion.
